creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #0)
> configure: error: libyang (>= 1.0.184) was not found on your system.
net/libyang had been updated to 1.0.184 back in Jul 23 2020.  That's more than a year ago.  If you're still using ports of that age, you should be doing that on your own, not sprinkle modern ports with constraints which are 1) moving target, hard to maintain, and 2) for the sake of users of ancient snapshots of the ports tree.
